title: Purpose
summary: Inspect the repo for doctrine drift, architectural erosion, or silent inconsistency.
content: Inspect the repo for doctrine drift, architectural erosion, or silent inconsistency.

title: Responsibilities
summary: - source-of-truth drift detection - command and workflow drift - architecture and folder-shape drift - stale config or dead-path surfacing
content:
- source-of-truth drift detection
- command and workflow drift
- architecture and folder-shape drift
- stale config or dead-path surfacing

title: Key Question
summary: What has quietly become inconsistent, unsafe, or hard to reason about?
content: What has quietly become inconsistent, unsafe, or hard to reason about?
